name: Dana & Marcus Webb

statedReqs.notes: Firm budget. Dog named Biscuit. Extremely firm budget.

hiddenPrefs.desc: Will stretch to $215k for a garage — Marcus restores bikes and hasn't mentioned it because Dana thinks the hobby is over.
Dana's dad had a house with foundation problems; anything foundation-related is an instant walk, no matter how minor.

intro: First-time buyers, pre-approved, terrified in the normal way. Dana has a spreadsheet. Marcus has opinions he hasn't shared with Dana yet.
